name: staged-review
description: Universal code review workflow — staged file review with bug detection, extraction analysis, TODO tracking, and abstraction opportunities. v1.15: commit-review owns merge-time bookkeeping (auto-undraft on green CI, sobelow drift check, bot cite-and-skip policy, user-gated merge + ROADMAP/CHANGELOG/README update on main + Linear close-out). Tier-2 Codex-Reviews-Cursor delegation disabled.
